Record Class ScalingContext

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.cmw.adaptive.scaling.ScalingContext
Record Components:
queueSize - current number of tasks waiting in the queue
currentWorkers - current total number of worker threads
activeWorkers - number of worker threads currently executing tasks
minWorkers - minimum allowed number of worker threads
maxWorkers - maximum allowed number of worker threads
cpuLoad - current CPU load as a percentage (0.0 to 100.0)
throughputPerWorker - current average throughput per worker (tasks/sec)
previousThroughputPerWorker - previous average throughput per worker (tasks/sec) from the last scaling check
avgExecutionTimeMillis - average execution time of recent tasks in milliseconds
public record ScalingContext(int queueSize, int currentWorkers, int activeWorkers, int minWorkers, int maxWorkers, double cpuLoad, double throughputPerWorker, double previousThroughputPerWorker, double avgExecutionTimeMillis) extends Record
Immutable context object containing metrics and state information used by the ScalingStrategy to make scaling decisions.

This record encapsulates all relevant data about the executor's current state, such as queue size, worker counts, CPU load, and throughput metrics. It is passed to the scaling strategy whenever a scaling decision needs to be made.

  • Constructor Details

    • ScalingContext

      public ScalingContext(int queueSize, int currentWorkers, int activeWorkers, int minWorkers, int maxWorkers, double cpuLoad, double throughputPerWorker, double previousThroughputPerWorker, double avgExecutionTimeMillis)
      Creates an instance of a ScalingContext record class.
      Parameters:
      queueSize - the value for the queueSize record component
      currentWorkers - the value for the currentWorkers record component
      activeWorkers - the value for the activeWorkers record component
      minWorkers - the value for the minWorkers record component
      maxWorkers - the value for the maxWorkers record component
      cpuLoad - the value for the cpuLoad record component
      throughputPerWorker - the value for the throughputPerWorker record component
      previousThroughputPerWorker - the value for the previousThroughputPerWorker record component
      avgExecutionTimeMillis - the value for the avgExecutionTimeMillis record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
